name: @levitate/tui-kit
description: Reusable terminal UI primitives for LevitateOS

scripts.build: bun run clean && bunx tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.format: bunx oxfmt --config ../../../.oxfmtrc.json --write src tests package.json tsconfig.json
scripts.format:check: bunx oxfmt --config ../../../.oxfmtrc.json --check src tests package.json tsconfig.json
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run lint && bun run format:check && bun run test
scripts.precommit: bun run format:check && bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run test
